ddls:
CREATE TABLE "contributors" (
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contributor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the contributor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contributor */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Organization or affiliation of the contributor */,
  "username" TEXT /* Unique username for each contributor */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography or description of the contributor */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the contributor's profile image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the contributor account was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the contributor's details */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role of the contributor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributors_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution record */,
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor making the contribution */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the contribution */,
  "added" INTEGER /* Number of lines added in the contribution */,
  "removed" INTEGER /* Number of lines removed in the contribution */,
  "changed" INTEGER /* Number of lines changed in the contribution */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Brief message describing the contribution */,
  "branch" TEXT /* Branch in the repository where the contribution was made */,
  "pull_request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pull request associated with the contribution */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the contribution (e.g., pending, merged, rejected) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the contribution was made */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the contribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_contributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contributor_id") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "changesets" (
  "changeset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each changeset */,
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contribution related to this changeset */,
  "changesets" INTEGER /* Number of changesets associated with the contribution */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Commit hash of the changeset */,
  "file_changes" TEXT /* Details of file changes (e.g., files added, modified, deleted) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the changeset was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the changeset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("changeset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_changesets_contribution_id FOREIGN KEY ("contribution_id") REFERENCES contributions ("contribution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contribution_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the contribution statistics record */,
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor for whom statistics are recorded */,
  "percent_added" REAL /* Percentage of lines added by the contributor */,
  "percent_removed" REAL /* Percentage of lines removed by the contributor */,
  "percent_changed" REAL /* Percentage of lines changed by the contributor */,
  "total_contributions" INTEGER /* Total number of contributions made by the contributor */,
  "total_lines" INTEGER /* Total number of lines contributed (added + removed + changed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistics were first recorded */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the statistics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contribution_stats_contributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contributor_id") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the open-source project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL to the project's repository */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the project is released */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_contributions" (
  "project_contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the project contribution record */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project to which the contribution belongs */,
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contribution made to the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project contribution was recorded */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the project contribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_contributions_contribution_id FOREIGN KEY ("contribution_id") REFERENCES contributions ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_contributions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., maintainer, contributor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
